nodes.name: Red-tinged myzomela
nodes.summary: The red-tinged myzomela (Myzomela rubrotincta) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It was formerly considered a subspecies of the dusky myzomela (Myzomela obscura), but was split as a distinct species by the IOC in 2021. It is found in the Obi Islands of Indonesia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. References External links Red-tinged Myzomela Myzomela rubrotincta at eBird Red-tinged Myzomela at Avibase—The World Bird Database Red-tinged Myzomela Myzomela rubrotincta at Birds of the World (subscription required)

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 世界鸟类学家联合会
nodes.summary: 世界鸟类学家联合会是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括Tasmanian boobook、Green parakeet、Fiery-capped manakin等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Myzomela
nodes.summary: Myzomela（Myzomela）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联41种鸟类，如Drab myzomela、White-chinned myzomela、Ruby-throated myzomela等41种鸟类。

nodes.name: 奧比群島
nodes.summary: 奧比群島是印度尼西亞的群島，位於布魯島和斯蘭島以北，北面有德那第島，南面有安汶島，行政方面由北摩鹿加省南哈马黑拉县負責管轄，最大島嶼是奧比島。
